content:
Goal: Create a bright, professional Japanese promotional flyer for a sponsor-supported elementary school sports class, using a cheerful children’s sports-clinic theme.

Canvas: Vertical A4 flyer, 3:4 aspect ratio, white background with rounded colorful corner swooshes in blue, orange, and green. Add playful confetti, stars, dots, circles, motion lines, and small sports icons throughout. Keep the design clean, print-ready, and family friendly.

Main branding: At the top center, place a circular sports-class logo with running and jumping child silhouettes, soccer ball and basketball icons, and the Japanese logo text {argument name="event logo text" default="小学生のスポーツ教室"}. Under it, add small text “supported by” and the Lovart logo in blue and green. Use the Lovart logo again near the bottom right with “supported by” above it.

Headline area: Large bold Japanese headline across the upper middle: {argument name="main headline text" default="小学生のスポーツ教室"}. Use thick rounded lettering with white outline and soft shadow; color the words blue, orange, and green. Beneath it, add the subheadline {argument name="subheadline text" default="理学療法士がチェック！"} in blue with small green accent lines.

Main layout: Divide the central area into a 2-by-2 dotted grid containing exactly 4 illustrated child activity check sections:
1. Posture check, upper left: a boy in blue sportswear standing in side profile, with a green label {argument name="posture label" default="姿勢チェック"} and text “まっすぐ立てているかな?” Add a vertical green dotted measuring line beside him.
2. Strength check, upper right: a smiling boy in orange shirt and shorts doing a squat or reaching pose, orange label “筋力チェック,” and text “力強く動けるかな?”
3. Flexibility check, lower left: a smiling girl in green shirt stretching forward while seated, green label “柔軟性チェック,” and text “体はやわらかいかな?”
4. Balance check, lower right: a smiling boy in blue shirt balancing on one leg with arms out, blue label “バランスチェック,” and text “バランスはしっかりとれているかな?”
Use soft pastel oval background shapes behind each child and a colorful flat vector illustration style.

Bottom information cards: Below the activity grid, place exactly 4 rounded rectangular summary cards in a row, each with a colored checkmark icon and bold Japanese title:
1. Green card: “姿勢,” smaller text “正しい姿勢をチェック.”
2. Orange card: “筋力,” smaller text “体の筋力をチェック.”
3. Green card: “柔軟性,” smaller text “体の柔らかさをチェック.”
4. Blue card: “バランス,” smaller text “バランス感覚をチェック.”

Event info row: Add exactly 3 rounded information boxes beneath the summary cards:
1. Blue people icon, label “対象,” value “小学生低学年〜高学年.”
2. Orange calendar icon, label “日時,” followed by four empty circle placeholders.
3. Green map-pin icon, label “場所,” followed by four empty circle placeholders.

Bottom CTA: Add a wide blue ribbon banner with a yellow star on the left and the Japanese slogan {argument name="bottom slogan text" default="運動パフォーマンスを向上させよう！"}; emphasize “向上” in yellow. At the very bottom left, add a blue rounded contact button with a white phone icon and “お問い合わせ,” followed by four empty circle placeholders.

Visual style: Modern Japanese children’s event flyer, high-quality vector graphics, vibrant blue/orange/green palette, rounded typography, crisp spacing, light shadows, playful but organized. Avoid photorealism, avoid clutter, no extra people beyond the 4 children in the activity grid, no extra cards beyond the specified counts.

content:
Goal: Create a polished black-and-white manga two-page-spread style comic page based on a simple one-page scene, drawn as a clean shoujo manga manuscript with delicate pen hatching, screentone-free ink linework, warm off-white paper texture, and thin black panel borders.

Canvas: Vertical page, about 3:4 aspect ratio, with three wide horizontal panels stacked from top to bottom. Use a hand-drawn manga border around each panel and slight paper grain. Overall mood is romantic, emotional, and gently dramatic.

Character: A cute teenage schoolgirl, {argument name="character name" default="unnamed schoolgirl"}, with light-colored hair in twin braids, straight bangs, a thick headband, small ribbon bows tied into the braids, large sparkling shoujo eyes, soft blush, and a sailor-style school uniform. She wears small cross-shaped earrings and carries a rectangular school bag with a cross charm. Her expression changes from worried hesitation to determined resolve to a confident, tender smile.

Layout and panel count: Use exactly 3 panels.
1. Top panel: A rooftop or elevated school terrace at sunset, city buildings in the distance, metal railings, drifting flower petals, soft clouds, and a calm wind. The girl leans on the railing in three-quarter view, resting one hand near her mouth in hesitation. Add an oval vertical Japanese speech bubble on the right containing exactly: 「…さっき、言いすぎたかな…」. Place a soft gray rectangular blur censor over the center of her face, obscuring facial features in this panel.
2. Middle panel: The same girl suddenly stands and moves forward with determination, holding or pulling up her school bag at her side. Use strong manga speed lines radiating from the background to show a decision moment. Add an oval vertical Japanese speech bubble on the right containing exactly: 「大丈夫。明日ちゃんと伝えよう。」. Place a soft gray rectangular blur censor over the center of her face, obscuring facial features in this panel.
3. Bottom panel: Close-up of the girl’s face, now uncensored and clearly visible, with sparkling eyes, blush marks, tiny heart highlights around her cheeks and hair, and a small confident smile while she lightly touches or holds her cross earring. Add an oval vertical Japanese speech bubble on the right containing exactly: 「私のやり方で、もう一度。」.

Visual style: Fine monochrome manga ink, expressive shoujo eyes, delicate crosshatching, clean contour lines, natural hand-drawn imperfections, subtle sunset atmosphere rendered only through linework, no color except the off-white paper background and gray face-censor blocks in the first two panels.

Constraints: Keep exactly 3 panels, exactly 3 speech bubbles, and exactly 2 gray face-obscuring rectangles. Do not add extra characters, extra captions, logos, watermarks, or modern UI elements. Preserve the Japanese text exactly as written.

content:
Goal: Create a whimsical hand-drawn anime movie poster for a cozy maritime adventure starring three mischievous spotted baby seals sailing toward a legendary island.

Canvas: Vertical poster, 3:4 aspect ratio, soft watercolor-and-ink illustration with warm cream highlights, teal ocean tones, misty blue sky, and gentle storybook shading.

Layout: Large Japanese movie title at the top center, sailboat filling the right and lower half, ocean and island background on the left, tagline text across the bottom. The composition should feel like a family adventure film poster.

Text content: At the very top, small text reads {argument name="small top label" default="映画"}. The main title, in large rounded cream letters with a dark brown outline, reads {argument name="main title" default="やわらかさんと幻の島"}. On the front of the wooden boat, painted text reads {argument name="boat name" default="やわらか丸"}. Bottom caption in bold white Japanese text with dark outline reads {argument name="bottom tagline" default="いたずらアザラシが、船乗りに語り継がれる伝説の島「ハイブラジル」へ向かって出航！"}. Tiny credit beneath reads {argument name="director credit" default="総監督：ペコちゃん"}.

Subject details: Show exactly three white spotted baby seals on the boat: 1) a small seal at the left bow holding a brass telescope to its eye and smiling, 2) a larger central seal at the wooden ship wheel, laughing happily with flippers on the wheel, 3) a small seal on the right side waving one flipper cheerfully. All three seals have soft rounded bodies, gray spots, tiny whiskers, black eyes, and cute open-mouth smiles.

Boat and props: A rustic wooden sailing boat with visible plank texture, curved bow, mast, ropes, rigging, tan sails, barrels, coiled rope, a small lantern, a compass on a box, pulleys, railings, and a bowsprit extending toward the viewer. Count the main visible deck props as exactly six: brass telescope, wooden barrel, compass, lantern, coiled rope, and rope pulley rigging.

Background: On the left horizon, show a misty legendary island with cliffs, a tall lighthouse, a small coastal town, green hills, and distant mountains partly hidden in fog. The boat sails through lively blue-green waves with white foam, with a dreamy cloudy sky above.

Visual style: Japanese illustrated children’s adventure film poster, watercolor wash, fine brown ink outlines, soft gradients, nostalgic Studio Ghibli-like warmth without copying any specific film, charming expressions, cinematic framing, high detail but gentle and cozy.

Constraints: Keep the title readable and dominant, use only the specified visible text, keep exactly three seals, no humans, no modern technology, no logos, no watermark.

content:
Use uploaded character as exact identity reference.

Reimagine them as a {argument name="profession" default="pharmacist"} in a {argument name="setting" default="modern Japanese dispensing pharmacy"}.

CORE:
Create a humorous but believable anime screencap where the medication counseling perfectly matches the character’s personality, archetype, genre, speech style, powers, worldbuilding, vibe, hidden quirks, emotional tone, and aesthetic identity.

The absurd medicine explanations must feel NATURAL for THIS character specifically.

First internally analyze:
personality, genre, role, energy, speech style, motifs, intelligence style, emotional tone, powers, hidden quirks, whether they are sleepy, smug, saintly, chaotic, elegant, mysterious, villainous, chuuni, shy, cool, etc.

Then generate the most character-accurate absurd medication explanation possible.

Examples:
cat → cat language medicine
chuuni → parallel world stabilizer
angel → divine resonance suppressants
vampire → sunlight tolerance tablets
magical girl → transformation stabilizers
office lady → anti-overtime hallucination pills
idol → crowd charm stabilizer
nun → miracle suppression medicine
yandere → emotional limiter
fox girl → illusion leakage suppressants
cyberpunk → firmware stabilizers
delinquent → battle aura suppressants
sleepy girl → anti-dream-overflow tablets
etc.

Include visible Japanese dialogue:
speech bubbles, medicine labels, prescription bag text, monitor text, sticky notes, subtitles.

NO:
Medication instruction memos,
One-point advice,
large info sheets,
posters,
counter documents.

Dialogue MUST match the character’s speaking style.

Examples:
「副作用は軽微。……たまに時間感覚が崩れるだけ」
「夢のラスボス戦が少し弱くなります〜」
「裏世界側と接続される可能性がある……気をつけろ」
「奇跡酔いを抑えるお薬です」

Environment:
realistic Japanese pharmacy,
medicine shelves,
dosage packaging machine,
medicine boxes,
fluorescent lighting,
pharmacy counter,
waiting chairs,
medicine bags,
monitor display,
natural clutter,
believable depth.

Character actions:
holding medicine,
pointing at pills,
explaining bizarre side effects,
handing over medicine bags,
serious professional attitude despite nonsense explanations.

Patient visible from behind or side.

Speech bubbles:
rounded manga style,
large readable Japanese text,
few lines,
not overcrowded.

Style:
{argument name="visual style" default="hand-drawn anime illustration"},
soft sketch lines,
watercolor paper texture,
visible linework,
warm handmade feeling,
anime screencap energy,
slice-of-life comedy atmosphere,
cinematic composition,
soft indoor lighting

content: Create a polished anime-style full-body character illustration on a clean white background: a glamorous adult fairy-demon woman named {argument name="character name" default="Patarin"} floating in a playful pin-up pose with one leg bent behind the other, one hand lifted near her head and the other extended outward. She has short bobbed {argument name="hair color" default="mint green"} hair with soft bangs, pointed elf ears, two glossy curved black demon horns, a small blue butterfly hair ornament, and a long thin black devil tail ending in a spade tip. Her face should be softly obscured or left featureless with a translucent square blur over the central face area. Dress her in a fitted navy business blazer over a white button-up blouse, a blue ribbon bow tie at the collar, a tight black pencil mini skirt, sheer dark brown pantyhose, and shiny black high heels. Give her a curvy mature figure and confident magical-girl energy while keeping the rendering elegant and high-detail. Behind her, draw exactly 2 large translucent butterfly wings, one on each side, glowing in cyan, lavender, pink, and electric blue, with multiple petal-like wing segments filled with faint magical runes and sparkling linework. content:
Goal: Create a colorful Japanese 15-second TV commercial storyboard for a fictional McDonald's-style superhero robot campaign, titled {argument name="headline text" default="15秒CM ストーリーボード"} with the red subheadline {argument name="subheadline text" default="マックロボ、出動！"}.

Canvas: Landscape 16:9 presentation board on a white background, divided into exactly 8 bordered storyboard panels arranged in a 4-column by 2-row grid. Each panel has a red square number badge in the top-left corner, a vivid illustration area, and a white caption area underneath with red timecode text and black Japanese description text. Add a tiny black disclaimer line along the bottom edge.

Visual style: High-energy Japanese anime commercial storyboard, toy-ad dynamism, saturated reds/yellows/blues, dramatic speed lines, sparks, explosions, city action, glossy mecha rendering, McDonald's-like golden arches branding, thick comic outlines, cinematic lighting. Use a polished generated-image look, not flat vector art.

Main characters and motifs: A family of four eating fast food; their faces should appear intentionally blurred or masked for privacy. A team of exactly 4 transforming meal-themed robots: 1 red burger hero robot with wings, 1 blue dinosaur/T-rex robot, 1 golden lion robot, and 1 golden phoenix/eagle robot. Also show burgers, fries, nuggets, soft drinks, and a giant spaghetti/noodle monster made of curly noodles.

Panel count and contents: Use exactly 8 panels.
1. Panel 1, timecode "0-2秒": The family of four sits at a McDonald's-like restaurant table full of burgers, fries, nuggets, drinks, and small toy robots. Caption: "家族みんなでマクドナルド！ おいしい！たのしい！"
2. Panel 2, timecode "2-4秒": Fast food items burst into transformation energy and become the 4 robots: red burger robot, blue dinosaur robot, golden lion robot, golden phoenix robot. Caption: "食べものが光って…ロボに変形！ マックロボ、誕生！"
3. Panel 3, timecode "4-6秒": A character introduction grid inside the panel, split into exactly 4 smaller portrait boxes labeled: "パパ：バーガーロボ", "ママ：フェニックスロボ", "お兄ちゃん：ティーレックスロボ", "妹：ライオンロボ". Caption: "それぞれのロボットへ！ いくよ、出動！"
4. Panel 4, timecode "6-8秒": The robot team launches into a city street under a blue sky with a McDonald's sign in the background; red winged robot flies forward, other 3 robots run below. Caption: "街をかけぬけ、 マックロボ、出動！"
5. Panel 5, timecode "8-10秒": A huge angry spaghetti/noodle monster towers over city traffic, with forks and flying noodle strands around it. Caption: "街が危ないぞ！"
6. Panel 6, timecode "10-12秒": The 4 robots fight the noodle monster together in the city, with explosions, energy blasts, and dramatic motion. Caption: "チームで力をあわせて、 えいっ！ とかーん！"
7. Panel 7, timecode "12-14秒": Victory pose of the 4 robots in the city, red robot centered with wings spread, celebratory red-and-white Japanese impact text across the image: {argument name="impact slogan" default="今日もマックで元気100倍"}. Caption: "今日もマックで元気100倍！ マックロボの勝利だ！"
8. Panel 8, timecode "14-15秒": Final brand end card: bright red background with a large yellow McDonald's-style golden arch logo, the family of four and the 4 robots posing together, plus white/yellow slogan text {argument name="end card slogan" default="ワクワクを、いっしょに。 I'm lovin' it"}. Caption: "ワクワクを、いっしょに。 マクドナルド"

Text and layout constraints: Keep all visible title, timecodes, panel numbers, and captions in Japanese exactly as specified. Use bold red timecodes centered under each image. Ensure the 8 panels are clearly separated by thin black borders. Do not add extra panels, extra robots, QR codes, watermarks, or unrelated logos beyond the McDonald's-inspired golden arches visual language.

content: Create a full-body front-facing 2D fashion doll / anime-inspired dress-up character on a vertical 2:3 canvas, standing in a glossy pastel candy stage. The character is a cute young female AI doll with a deliberately blank smooth face with no eyes, nose, or mouth, light skin, and {argument name="hair color" default="warm caramel brown"} hair styled into exactly two high curled twin tails with ringlet curls and small bangs mostly hidden by accessories. She wears an elaborate sweet lolita idol outfit in {argument name="main outfit colors" default="mint green, cream, pink, yellow, and turquoise"}: a floral candy headband with many tiny bows, pearls, beads, flowers, and pastel dessert charms; a cream puff-sleeve blouse with pink edging; one large yellow bow at the chest with a turquoise gem center; a mint corset bodice with brown trim and pink crisscross lacing; a short layered cupcake skirt with exactly four visible ruffle tiers in cream, pink, yellow, and lace-trimmed pastel layers, decorated with tiny sprinkles, bows, hearts, and dessert ornaments; white thigh-high lace stockings with pink ribbon lacing; and pink platform Mary Jane heels with heart decorations and pastel straps. Count the main symmetrical elements clearly: 2 curled twin tails, 2 puff sleeves, 1 chest bow, 1 corset, 4 skirt ruffle tiers, 2 thigh-high stockings, 2 pink platform shoes, 2 large spiral candy-cane columns in the background, and 2 round pink heart medallions behind her. Background: a high-key pastel confectionery set with a mint-and-cream checkerboard tiled wall, twisted mint-yellow candy columns forming an arch, pink heart disks on both sides, glossy pale pink floor, soft studio lighting, dreamy overexposed highlights, clean kawaii aesthetic, highly detailed fabric textures, lace, ribbons, beads, plastic-doll smoothness, sharp full-body composition. content:
Goal: Create a monochrome-and-red Japanese character reference sheet for {argument name="character name" default="CHRONOWA"}, a cute cool black cat mascot who listens to night sounds, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones.

Canvas: Vertical A4 poster / character sheet, off-white paper background with thin black border, red corner accents, small halftone dots, barcode, waveform graphics, tiny city skyline silhouettes, and a red crescent moon. Palette is strict: black, white, gray, and vivid red only. Style is clean vector mascot design mixed with Japanese graphic-design infographic aesthetics.

Top header: Large Japanese title 「クロノワ」 followed by “/ {argument name="romanized name" default="CHRONOWA"}”. Subtitle underneath: 「夜の音を聴く黒猫」 with a small red audio waveform line. Add a black city skyline at the top right under a red crescent moon.

Main subject: Center the largest full-body front view of the black cat, sitting upright with a curled tail, large pointed ears, thin whiskers, oversized white sunglasses with black lenses and white highlights, and red-and-black headphones resting around the neck. Label this central view 「正面」.

Left column poses: Include exactly 3 smaller pose panels with black label tabs: 1) 「側面」 side view, sitting profile, wearing white sunglasses and red headphones around the neck; 2) 「リスニング」 listening pose, headphones worn over the ears, paws touching headphones, small music note; 3) 「リラックス」 relaxed lying pose, sunglasses on, headphones around neck.

Right column item and mood panels: Include an item box labeled 「アイテム」 with exactly 2 items: 1) white sunglasses labeled 「白いサングラス」, 2) red headphones labeled 「赤いヘッドホン」. Below it, include a mood icon box labeled 「表情・ムードアイコン」 with exactly 6 small black cat icons in a 2-column by 3-row grid, each wearing sunglasses: 1) 「ごきげん」 with music note and raised tail, 2) 「気まぐれ」 sitting with subtle motion marks, 3) 「照れ」 shy blushing / embarrassed pose, 4) 「警戒」 alert pose with motion marks, 5) 「やさしい」 gentle pose with a small red heart, 6) 「生意気」 cocky/annoyed pose with red anger mark.

Bottom information grid: Create exactly 8 bordered information cards with black angled headers and red section numbers. Card 01 「プロフィール」 lists: 種族：黒猫, 性別：不詳, 年齢：不明, 一人称：ボク, 住処：夜の街. Card 02 「性格」 lists exactly 5 bullet points: クール, 気まぐれ, 照れ屋, 実はやさしい, 少し生意気. Card 03 「特徴」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 白いサングラス, 赤いヘッドホン, 音の色が見える, 街の感情を聴ける. Card 04 「好きなもの」 lists exactly 4 lines: 夜の街 / 音楽 / 屋上 / 赤いもの / 雨上がりの道路, plus a red hand-drawn heart. Card 05 「苦手なもの」 lists exactly 3 lines: 強い日差し / 大きすぎる音 / しつこい相手, with a red sun warning icon. Card 06 「能力」 lists exactly 4 bullet points: 音を聴き分ける, 夜道に詳しい, 気配を消すのが得意, 小さな幸運を運ぶ, plus a tiny cat silhouette and red star. Card 07 「設定」 contains a compact Japanese backstory about red headphones collecting memories and emotions of the city at night, and how the cat sees sound colors through white sunglasses. Card 08 「セリフ」 contains exactly 4 quotes: 「今夜の音、悪くないね」, 「昼は苦手。」, 「世界が明るすぎる」, 「いい夜だね。少しだけ、歩こうか」, with a red paw print.

Footer: Add a barcode at bottom left, the word “CHRONOWA”, a red handwritten “meow”, a small black skyline silhouette along the bottom, and “LISTEN TO THE NIGHT.” at the bottom right.

Visual style: Sharp flat vector shapes, slightly imperfect printed zine texture, clean Japanese UI label tabs, thin technical lines, red accents on tabs and icons, high contrast silhouette cat. Keep text legible, preserve all Japanese labels exactly, and do not add extra characters or extra panels.

content: Please transform this illustration into a modern Paper Sculpture style. content:
Create a high-end art piece in the style of Dunhuang murals centered on [{argument name="core character" default="Water Moon Guanyin"}]. The composition uses a circular light halo moon wheel center, with the main character as the sole visual core, expressing a sacred moment of seated relaxation overlooking clear water. The atmosphere should be ethereal, quiet, and complete, with museum-level aesthetics and cultural depth.
Character requirements:
The subject should present an elegant, majestic, and divine temperament with a dignified face, not a common ancient-style beauty. Intricate gold hair crowns, pearl chains, and jewelry are worn. Clothing is luxurious with smooth lines and rhythmic flying celestial qualities.
Gold structure requirements:
Strengthen structural gold usage to form a clear luxurious order. Use gold tracing, liquid gold, and gold leaf on crowns, clothing edges, and embroidery. Sacred elements like halos, lotus petals, and borders should have visible but restrained high-end gold decoration, presenting a 'worn but luxurious' texture.
Color requirements:
Colors include ochre red, cinnabar, stone green, stone blue, and ivory white, supplemented by refined gold. The tone is rich, thick, and elegant.
Decorative elements:
Integrate flying celestials, lotuses, auspicious clouds, and classical border decorations. Keep accompanying figures minimal (e.g., Sudhana) to maintain focus on the main subject.
Texture requirements:
Emphasize old grotto mural and mineral pigment textures, with visible cracks, weathering, and historal patina, while retaining the luster of gold leaf for a high-end artistic feel.
prompt:
Create a high-end art piece in the style of Dunhuang murals centered on [{argument name="core character" default="Water Moon Guanyin"}]. The composition uses a circular light halo moon wheel center, with the main character as the sole visual core, expressing a sacred moment of seated relaxation overlooking clear water. The atmosphere should be ethereal, quiet, and complete, with museum-level aesthetics and cultural depth.
Character requirements:
The subject should present an elegant, majestic, and divine temperament with a dignified face, not a common ancient-style beauty. Intricate gold hair crowns, pearl chains, and jewelry are worn. Clothing is luxurious with smooth lines and rhythmic flying celestial qualities.
Gold structure requirements:
Strengthen structural gold usage to form a clear luxurious order. Use gold tracing, liquid gold, and gold leaf on crowns, clothing edges, and embroidery. Sacred elements like halos, lotus petals, and borders should have visible but restrained high-end gold decoration, presenting a 'worn but luxurious' texture.
Color requirements:
Colors include ochre red, cinnabar, stone green, stone blue, and ivory white, supplemented by refined gold. The tone is rich, thick, and elegant.
Decorative elements:
Integrate flying celestials, lotuses, auspicious clouds, and classical border decorations. Keep accompanying figures minimal (e.g., Sudhana) to maintain focus on the main subject.
Texture requirements:
Emphasize old grotto mural and mineral pigment textures, with visible cracks, weathering, and historal patina, while retaining the luster of gold leaf for a high-end artistic feel.
title: Dunhuang Mural Water Moon Guanyin
description: A majestic prompt for creating museum-grade art in Dunhuang mural style featuring the Water Moon Guanyin with intricate gold details and mineral textures.

content: Create a dark, highly detailed gothic anime illustration of {argument name="character count" default="two"} androgynous punk-lolita characters seated close together in an ornate candlelit Victorian room. The left character is a tall slim demon-like young man with messy {argument name="male hair color" default="black"} hair, pale skin, exposed chest and abs under sheer black lace, layered chokers and necklaces with cross and pentagram pendants, many rings, black leather pants with zippers, belts, chains, buckles, and a deep navy-black fur-trimmed jacket; one large black bat wing rises behind his left shoulder. The right character is a petite gothic lolita girl leaning against him, with long wavy {argument name="female hair color" default="dark brown"} hair braided and decorated with many tiny pink bows and heart clips, wearing a black lace bodice, pink ribbons, layered pink-and-black tutu skirt, fishnet stockings, strapped platform boots, chains, star charms, and an oversized pale pink fur-trimmed coat; one pale feathered angel wing is visible behind her right shoulder. Count exactly two visible wings total: one black bat wing on the left character and one pale feathered wing on the right character. Their faces are intentionally hidden by soft-edged opaque brown rectangular censor blocks, one larger rectangle over the taller character’s face and one smaller rectangle over the girl’s face. Use a moody romantic composition, close cropped vertical portrait, bodies intertwined, luxurious gothic accessories, lace textures, metallic chains, leather straps, fur, bows, crosses, pentagrams, hearts, and star charms. Background: dim antique interior with gilded picture frames, dark wallpaper, and a few tall candles glowing on the right. Lighting is low-key and cinematic, with warm candle highlights and cool purple-black shadows, ultra-detailed digital painting, dramatic dark fantasy fashion editorial atmosphere, {argument name="color palette" default="black, midnight blue, dusty pink, mauve, and candlelit gold"}.

content: Create a cinematic anime-realistic background scene on a quiet Japanese suburban residential street in {argument name="location" default="Chofu City, near Jindaiji-dori"} on a bright summer afternoon. A small elf girl with {argument name="hair color" default="pale blue bob-cut hair"}, pointed ears, and a calm profile expression walks from right to left across the foreground, wearing a loose white short-sleeved knee-length dress, white socks, and brown lace-up ankle boots. She holds a rope leash attached to a white goat walking beside her; the goat has short curved horns, shaggy fur, and follows obediently in side view. Behind the goat trails a compact dark steampunk robot companion, squat and armored, made of blackened metal plates, exposed gears, pipes, bolts, red lens eyes, and little horn-like antennae, walking like a loyal mechanical pet. The street slopes gently downhill into the distance, lined with concrete block walls, hedges, small two-story houses with tiled roofs, utility poles, overhead power lines, a curved streetlamp, guardrails, drainage grates, and leafy trees casting dappled shadows on the asphalt. The background should feel like a plausible real Japanese neighborhood, with detailed perspective, distant houses and greenery, blue sky, scattered white clouds, warm sunlight, soft atmospheric haze, and highly detailed painterly rendering. Blend whimsical fantasy characters naturally into a realistic urban environment, with consistent lighting and shadows, 16:9 landscape composition, eye-level camera, wide shot, no text, no signage emphasis.

content: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic night street scene in {argument name="city" default="Tokyo"}, showing a narrow rainy alley lined with ramen shops and dense vertical neon signs. The camera is at street level with a wide-angle documentary feel, looking down the wet pavement where blue, red, and white neon reflections stretch across puddles. In the right foreground, an open-air ramen counter glows with warm amber light and heavy steam; a chef in a dark work shirt with tattooed forearms lifts noodles from a boiling pot with chopsticks, his face obscured by a soft rectangular anonymizing blur. Hang exactly two prominent red paper lanterns over the stall, both with bold black Japanese text {argument name="lantern text" default="ラーメン"}. Add stainless pots, stacked bowls, chopsticks, condiment bottles, hanging lamps, dark noren curtains, and a tall black wooden signboard with large gold Japanese calligraphy beside the counter. The background alley should contain distant silhouettes of pedestrians, countless small illuminated storefront signs, rain streaks, mist, and atmospheric steam drifting through the scene. Style: photorealistic but clearly AI-generated, high dynamic range, moody cyberpunk-noir color palette, wet asphalt, volumetric lighting, sharp foreground detail, deep perspective, 16:9 composition, dramatic contrast, shot as if with a 24mm lens at night after rainfall.

content: Create a dark, cinematic surreal photo-illustration of a person in left profile, mostly hidden in shadow, exhaling a long horizontal plume of smoke across the frame. The upper-left face area is obscured by a large flat opaque rectangle in {argument name="censor block color" default="dark warm brown"}, covering the eyes and upper face like an intentional privacy mask. The subject has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} loose hair strands visible near the neck and jaw, with only the lower cheek, neck, and hair edge softly lit. The smoke is the main focus: dense, translucent, swirling gray-beige vapor stretching from the mouth toward the right side, with delicate turbulent curls and layered mist. Inside the smoke, embed a faint dreamlike miniature memory scene: silhouettes of people sitting together, a child or rider on a bicycle, trees, and a distant suburban house, all ghostly and semi-transparent as if formed from smoke. The background is an out-of-focus dim interior with vertical curtain or window shapes in muted olive, charcoal, and brown tones, with a narrow cool beam of light falling from above near the center-right. Use moody low-key lighting, shallow depth of field, soft grain, realistic smoke simulation, muted sepia color grading, and a contemplative atmosphere suggesting memories leaving the body as breath. Landscape composition, 3:2 aspect ratio, no readable text.

content: Create a grand romantic realist oil painting of an alpine wilderness at {argument name="time of day" default="golden sunset"}, with a vast calm mountain lake in the foreground reflecting the sky, pine forests, rocky shores, and towering snow-covered peaks. The central peak is majestic and sharply lit with warm orange sunlight, surrounded by rugged cliffs and distant glaciers fading into atmospheric mist. The sun sits low near the right horizon, casting glowing amber light across the water and illuminating scattered clouds in a dramatic blue-and-gold sky. Dense evergreen trees frame both sides of the composition, especially a dark forest wall on the right and steep rocky cliffs on the left. Add subtle details: mist rising from the lake, scattered foreground rocks and driftwood, warm reflections rippling on the water, and exactly 2 deer standing near the right shoreline. Use {argument name="painting style" default="19th-century Hudson River School romantic landscape"}, highly detailed brushwork, luminous atmosphere, epic scale, serene mood, rich warm color palette, naturalistic lighting, no text, no borders.

content: Please make this look like a {argument name="author" default="kindergarten child"} drew it with {argument name="art tools" default="colored pencils"}. Don't make it a clean drawing. Don't make it a good drawing. Don't make it cute. Please make it look like a genuinely poorly drawn picture by a child. It was drawn on white paper with colored pencils. I looked at the original picture and tried to copy it, but I couldn't do it well at all. The lines are wiggly. There are almost no straight lines. I traced them many times, so the lines are thick. The lines cut off in strange places. The shapes aren't proper. The sizes are inconsistent. Big parts are too big, small parts are too small. Eyes, mouth, body, etc., are in slightly weird places. The positions are slightly off. Something is just a bit wrong. The colors are outside the lines. There are uncolored spots. There are heavily colored areas and light areas. There are marks from scrubbing hard with the pencils. Don't make it a proper illustration. Don't clean it up digitally. Don't make the lines neat. Don't fix the shapes. Don't balance it well. It's a bit bad. It's quite bad. But the child worked hard on it. Please make it look like a child is showing it to you saying, 'Look, I did it!' The background is just plain white paper. Make the expression look childlike too.

content: Editorial 3x3 photo grid in a clean {argument name="studio style" default="soft beige studio"}. Character (matches reference 100%) wearing {argument name="outfit" default="lightweight dark navy shirt, ivory trousers"}, barefoot for raw simplicity. Lighting: large diffused key light directly front-right, silver reflector left, subtle rim from top. Shots to include: 1. extreme close-up of lips + cheekbone with blurred hand partially covering (85mm, f/1.8, razor-thin DOF); 2. tight crop on eyes looking into lens with reflection of light strip visible (85mm, f/2.0); 3. black & white close portrait resting chin on fist, face filling frame (50mm, f/2.2); 4. over-shoulder shot, blurred foreground fabric curtain framing half face (85mm, f/2.0); 5. very close frontal with hands overlapping face, light streak across eyes (50mm, f/2.5); 6. tight angled portrait showing hair falling into eyes, soft-focus background (85mm, f/2.2); 7. crop of hands touching jawline, eyes cropped out (50mm, f/3.2, detail-focused); 8. half-body seated sideways on low cube, head turned sharply away, blurred foreground (35mm, f/ 4.5); 9. intense close-up of profile with single tear-like water droplet, cinematic light slice across (85mm, f/ 1.9). Angles: mostly tight headshots with slight high/low tilts, maintaining variation. Capture RAW, professional muted grade, smooth tonal contrast, subtle cinematic grain. Mood: intimate, introspective, character-led editorial minimalism with delicate use of fabric as prop.

content:
A clean instructional poster in a 4x4 grid (16 panels) showing a male martial artist demonstrating Pencak Silat choreography. The subject is a fit man with medium-length dark hair and a beard, wearing a red button-up shirt, beige pants, and white sneakers. Style is semi-realistic illustration mixed with hand-drawn sketch lines, soft shadows, and a light textured paper background. Each panel includes subtle motion arrows and small captions. Minimalist, balanced layout. Top title at top: 'Pencak Silat Choreography – 16 Counts – 10 Seconds – Smooth Flowy Chill'.

Panel 1: wide ready stance, knees bent, one hand guarding forward, focused expression.
Panel 2: step forward with outward block, arm extended defensively.
Panel 3: inside block sweeping upward diagonally, torso rotating.
Panel 4: strong straight punch forward, aligned hips.
Panel 5: side step into low stance, both hands pushing outward.
Panel 6: knee lifted high in chamber position, balanced posture.
Panel 7: front kick extended forward, opposite arm guarding.
Panel 8: step backward into defensive cover, arms crossing.
Panel 9: low block, sweeping arm downward in deep stance.
Panel 10: hook punch across body with hip rotation.
Panel 11: turning body with pivoting feet, circular motion.
Panel 12: forward palm strike, stable stance.
Panel 13: low sweeping motion near ground in squat stance.
Panel 14: rising smoothly from low stance, upward motion.
Panel 15: controlled locking pose, one arm raised defensively.
Panel 16: closing salute, feet together, hands pressed at chest, calm posture.

Include hand-drawn arrows (blue and purple accents), clean infographic layout, evenly spaced panels, consistent character design across all frames.

A focused male martial artist performs a smooth, flowing Pencak Silat sequence in a minimalist studio. He is in his late 20s, athletic build, medium height, warm tan skin, with thick wavy dark hair and a short, well-groomed beard. He wears a fitted deep red button-up shirt with sleeves rolled to the forearms, beige slim-fit pants with slight wear at the knees, and clean white sneakers. His expression is calm, controlled, and intent. 
The setting is a softly lit neutral studio with an off-white textured backdrop and a slightly worn wooden floor. Lighting is diffused and cinematic, creating gentle shadows and emphasizing fluid motion.
The choreography is continuous and rhythmic, with no abrupt cuts: 
0–2s: Starts in a grounded ready stance, knees bent, one palm forward in guard, eyes locked ahead 
2–4s: steps forward into an outward block, transitioning into an inside sweeping block upward 
4–6s: rotates hips into a straight punch, then shifts weight into a side step with a pushing motion 
6–8s: lifts knee smoothly and extends into a controlled front kick, maintaining balance 
8–10s: steps back into a guarded cover, drops into a low block, then rises into a hook punch 
10–12s: pivots the body with a clean turn, transitioning into a forward palm strike 
12–14s: lowers into a sweeping motion, then rises fluidly into a locking control pose 
14–15s: finishes upright with a respectful closing salute, hands together at chest level 
Movement style is soft, flowing, controlled, with precise martial intention rather than aggression. Emphasis on balance, breath, and continuity. Camera is a steady medium-wide shot with subtle slow tracking, no cuts.

She stands in a three-quarter pose from mid-thigh up, centered, with her left hand on her hip and her right hand giving a thumbs-up. She also wears 4 visible accessories: 2 long white elbow gloves, 2 stacked emerald-green wrist bands, small pink gemstone stud earrings, and a green choker. content: A dramatic full-body fantasy bridal portrait of {argument name="character name" default="a young woman"} standing in a ruined gothic cathedral, viewed from a slightly low angle to emphasize the grandeur of the dress. She wears an elaborate wedding gown with a fitted white corset bodice, delicate lace embroidery, off-shoulder lace details, and long translucent lace gloves. The skirt is extremely voluminous and layered with cascading ruffles, sheer fabric, and lace-trimmed panels, featuring a striking {argument name="accent color" default="deep crimson red"} to white gradient concentrated toward the lower inner layers and center front, with rich red fabric visible beneath the white overskirt. Add red rose clusters and ribbon accents at the waist and down the front of the gown, plus a large floral hair ornament made of white flowers and red roses. Her {argument name="hair color" default="dark wine red"} hair is styled in a soft updo with loose strands, and she wears a long cathedral veil edged with intricate lace that spreads behind her. In one hand she holds or rests near a bouquet of red and white roses. Surround her with floating rose petals, mostly red with a few white petals, creating a cinematic sense of motion. The setting is a vast abandoned cathedral interior with towering pointed arches, broken tracery windows, weathered stone, climbing vines, and soft daylight streaming through the openings. The mood is elegant, ethereal, romantic, and slightly gothic, with ultra-detailed fabric rendering, realistic lace texture, soft glow, high contrast, and polished painterly-photoreal fantasy illustration. Keep the red accents clean, luxurious, and floral rather than smeared, avoiding any blood-like appearance.

content:
Generate a monochrome grayscale technical illustration, a biomechanically accurate fitness instruction sheet, clean 3D anatomical figures, scientific diagram aesthetics, minimalist style, no artistic exaggeration. 

2x4 grid layout (total of 8 panels), perfectly aligned cells, equal spacing, thin black border, numbered 1 to 8. 

Neutral athletic human body (gender-neutral), proportional anatomy, consistent figure across all panels. 

{argument name="training sequence" default="Dumbbell training"} sequence (key positions only): 
1. Dumbbell Curl (starting position) 
2. Dumbbell Curl (top contraction) 
3. Shoulder Press (start at shoulder height) 
4. Shoulder Press (overhead lockout) 
5. Lateral Raise (arms down) 
6. Lateral Raise (arms to shoulder height) 
7. Dumbbell Squat (standing start) 
8. Squat (bottom position). 

Top left corner: bold number + movement name (Chinese). 
Center: full-body pose (clear joint positioning). 
Bottom left corner: brief technical description (2–3 lines, correct posture cues). 
Overlay: directional arrows showing the path of motion (up/down/arc). 

Correct joint alignment, neutral spine, proper elbow and knee positioning, realistic weight distribution, no exaggerated movements. 

Highly detailed grayscale shading, soft studio lighting, subtle shadows, clean lines, medical/sports science diagram quality. 

Solid white background. 

No color, no background environment, no extra elements, no stylization, no blur.

content: A warm, nostalgic anime illustration in a childlike crayon-drawing style on textured beige paper, featuring a super-deformed chibi cat-eared maid girl lying on her stomach and drawing in a large spiral sketchbook. She has oversized cat ears, a frilly white maid headband, twin tails, and multicolored hair in bright pastel rainbow sections of pink, blue, yellow, and orange, with large teal-blue eyes and a calm, focused expression. Her black-and-white maid outfit includes bows, lace, puffy sleeves, fluffy cuffs, and tiny decorative clips. She holds a blue crayon and is drawing a simple crayon character on the open sketchbook page. Around her is a messy tabletop or floor covered with colorful crayon scribbles and loose sheets of paper. Include exactly 6 visible crayons scattered around the scene in different colors, with no crayon box packaging prominently shown. On the left, place a small cardboard box containing a sleepy black cat nestled among crayons, and draw a simple cat-face doodle near it. In the lower left foreground, include 1 small toy-like white robot cat figure with blue accents sitting and watching. In the upper right background, hang exactly 2 children's drawings clipped to a string: one with a pink heart and one with a flower and rainbow. On the upper left, add large handwritten Japanese crayon text reading 「完璧じゃなくて いーんだよ！ だって、今日の わたしは がんばったもん！」 in multicolored crayon lettering. Use soft lighting, cozy craft-room atmosphere, gentle grain, and intentionally rough waxy crayon texture throughout the entire image. Make it adorable, heartfelt, and handmade-looking, with visible uneven outlines and layered scribbles, but do not show realistic crayons being actively presented to the viewer.

In the background, include 1 potted leafy houseplant on the left and sheer pale curtains behind the sofa. Use a muted palette of warm gray, cream, off-white, dusty charcoal, and pale taupe, with sketchy pencil-like linework, delicate watercolor wash shading, airy negative space, and a calm intimate mood like a fashion-lifestyle editorial illustration.

content: A dreamy mixed-media pastel illustration on textured white paper with a visible vertical fold down the center, in a naive childlike crayon-and-oil-pastel style. Show a half-hidden portrait of a girl placed slightly left of center, with only part of her face visible because a large soft-edged rectangular blur obscures the middle of the image from forehead to chest. The visible features include dark teal-black hair, one warm brown eye, hints of cheek and neck, and a cream or pale yellow garment. Surround her with loose scribbled botanical lines and abstract strokes in turquoise, olive green, black, white, ochre, and peach. Scatter hand-drawn Japanese hiragana and numbers around the composition like children’s marks on paper: 「新」 and 「し」 in orange at the upper left, 「お」「ば」「ら」 stacked vertically on the upper right in mustard and dark olive, a small turquoise flag shape at mid-right, an orange sun symbol near the lower center-right, the number-like text 「11.6」 in brown at the lower right, and an orange open-book icon at the lower left. Add several sweeping diagonal crayon lines in golden yellow and white crossing behind and around the figure. Keep the composition airy, imperfect, expressive, and slightly melancholic, with rough grainy pigment, visible paper texture, muted earthy colors, and the feel of a child’s memory drawing combined with contemporary art illustration.

content: A perfectly centered sacred-geometry mandala on a clean white background, rendered as an ultra-detailed visionary ink-and-pointillism illustration. The composition is radially symmetrical and circular overall, glowing with warm gold, saffron, orange, coral, magenta, violet, and hints of cyan at the core. In the exact center, place a radiant circular nucleus with a bright cyan-blue dot surrounded by concentric rings of pink, magenta, orange, and gold, like a luminous spiritual sun. Around it, build many densely packed concentric bands of tiny jewel-like eyes, bead forms, dots, and filigree, all arranged with precise rotational symmetry. Form a four-point diamond structure around the center, with 4 large petal-like flame clusters pointing up, down, left, and right, and 4 smaller curled spiral clusters in the diagonal quadrants. At the outer cardinal points, include 4 larger almond-shaped eye motifs embedded in feathery golden forms. Across the mandala, include dozens of miniature multicolored eyes set into rings, suggesting omniscient awareness. Use extremely fine stippling, micro-linework, ornate feathered textures, and shimmering decorative detail, with the inner structure predominantly luminous gold and ivory, transitioning to a diffuse halo of violet and lavender stippled particles at the outer edge. The image should feel mystical, transcendent, intricate, balanced, and meditative, like a celestial mandala or visionary sacred emblem, with crisp high-detail line art and soft radiant color blending.

content: A highly detailed photorealistic portrait of a young Japanese woman styled like an elegant idol-inspired Valentine character, shot indoors in a luxurious vintage room with warm afternoon sunlight streaming through tall windowpanes behind her. She is seated or leaning forward toward the camera, extending both hands to offer a round red gift box of assorted chocolates in the foreground, creating a slightly intimate first-person perspective. Her face is mostly hidden by her short wavy bob haircut and downward tilt of the head, giving a shy, gentle, mysterious mood. She has {argument name="hair color" default="soft ash brown with subtle green-tinted ends"} hair in a chin-length tousled bob with glossy texture, and wears a deep wine-red beret with a ribbon and a beige polka-dot bow on the right side. Her outfit is a rich {argument name="outfit color" default="dark burgundy"} gothic-lolita inspired dress with a sleeveless high-neck halter bodice, sheer patterned fabric, black lace trim, fine gold accents, a small heart-shaped jewel at the collar, matching detached arm warmers with translucent ruffled cuffs, frilled wrist accessories, dangling heart earrings, and delicate chain decorations around the waist. The chocolate box is round and red, tied with a metallic gold ribbon, and contains exactly 8 visible chocolates in black dividers, including one red heart-shaped piece and 7 assorted square or rounded pralines. The setting includes soft floral arrangements, antique decor, and a crystal chandelier bokeh in the background. Use cinematic shallow depth of field, strong backlighting, realistic skin and fabric rendering, subtle lens bloom, warm amber highlights, rich shadows, and an upscale fashion editorial style that feels like a real-life adaptation of {argument name="character concept" default="an elegant mature idol with a romantic Valentine theme"}. Emphasize exquisite costume craftsmanship, a slightly cosplay-like but premium studio-photo realism, and a refined, wistful atmosphere.

content: A highly realistic cinematic CG portrait of a graceful young Chinese wuxia heroine standing on a traditional wooden balcony overlooking misty blue-gray mountain ranges at dawn. She is shown from about mid-thigh up, centered slightly right of frame, with elegant upright posture and both hands gently clasped at her waist. She wears an ornate black silk hanfu-inspired robe with deep red trim and lining, wide flowing sleeves, and intricate gold embroidery featuring 1 large dragon motif on the chest, multiple cloud patterns, and embroidered details along the skirt and sleeves. Her hair is styled in a refined historical updo with 1 decorative floral hairpin cluster and 2 long dangling ornaments, and she wears delicate bracelets and drop earrings. The setting includes 1 curved wooden bench along the balcony railing, 2 large wooden pillars, 1 carved wooden screen panel, and 1 lacquered side table with a guqin placed on top. Soft warm sunrise light comes from the left, creating gentle highlights on the silk fabric and wood, while the distant mountains remain layered in pale atmospheric haze. Emphasize ultra-detailed fabric texture, polished wood, elegant Chinese classical architecture, serene noble mood, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and garment rendering, and a premium historical-drama aesthetic. Use {argument name="camera framing" default="medium full portrait"}, {argument name="outfit color" default="black and deep red"}, {argument name="embroidery subject" default="gold dragon and clouds"}, {argument name="time of day" default="sunrise"}, and {argument name="background setting" default="misty mountain balcony"}.

content: A bright, polished anime illustration set inside a Japanese supermarket snack aisle, viewed in a wide-angle perspective down the row of shelves. Five shopping carts are lined up diagonally from front left to back right, each cart overflowing with packaged snacks and groceries, and each cart carrying a cute anthropomorphic or costumed character in an energetic pose. In the front cart, a large fluffy tabby cat boy mascot with brown-and-cream striped fur, big golden eyes, a happy open-mouthed smile, and oversized pink paw pads stands with one paw raised toward the viewer; he wears a white hoodie with a black bunny logo and the text “NYA!”, black athletic shorts with yellow side stripes, and a small bell collar. In the second cart, a cheerful shiba inu boy with tan-and-cream fur grins and strikes a dab-like pose, wearing a red sleeveless hoodie or vest over a white shirt and black shorts. In the third cart, an orange fox boy with white muzzle and chest stands confidently with arms crossed, eyes closed in a smug smile, sparkling accents around him, wearing a black tracksuit with orange trim and chunky bead accessories. In the fourth cart, a human figure in a light blue hoodie with long white rabbit ears attached raises both hands in peace signs; the face is deliberately blurred or obscured, with dark shorts and a playful pose. In the fifth cart, a small brown bear mascot in a green T-shirt with a bear face graphic and the text “KUMA” throws both arms up excitedly. The supermarket environment is packed with colorful snack boxes and bags on both sides, with glossy tile floors, ceiling lights, and Japanese sale signage hanging overhead. Include exactly 3 large hanging signs: one top left poster reading “新商品! 新商品!” with a cute character illustration, one central aisle marker sign with a big green “2” and category text “スナック菓子 シリアル” and “カップ麺 パン 飲料”, and one top right blue-and-red sale poster reading “今がお得! 大感謝セール”. Include exactly 1 vertical shelf sign on the left reading “サクサク食感”. content: A highly detailed anime-style illustration of a quiet rural Japanese train station platform in bright summer daylight, with a full-body young woman in the foreground wearing a classic black-and-white Victorian maid dress. She stands slightly left of center on the platform, facing forward, holding out both sides of her skirt in a formal curtsy-like pose. Her outfit includes a black long-sleeved dress with white frilled trim, a large white apron, a white ruffled maid headband, white cuffs, white petticoat layers peeking from under the skirt, white socks, and black Mary Jane shoes. Use {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair, straight and long with soft bangs. Her face should be obscured with a soft blurred mosaic block, as if anonymized. Behind her, on the nearest track, place an older cream-colored local train with a bold blue horizontal stripe, viewed from the front at a slight angle, with a destination sign reading "普通". On the right-side track, place a second train: a bright yellow local train farther back, also with "普通" on the front. Show 2 trains total. The station is an open-air, slightly nostalgic Japanese platform with overhead electrical lines, steel gantries, weathered wooden roofing, concrete platform edges, and yellow tactile paving. On the left, include a large station sign reading "のの", "Nono", and "福岡県福岡市", with directional arrows and the two destination labels "博多 Hakata" and "天神 Tenjin". Also show 2 platform number signs: "1 のりば" above the foreground platform and "2 のりば" on the opposite platform. Add small flowers near the base of the station sign, warm sunlight, crisp shadows, blue sky, and fluffy white summer clouds. Composition should feel like a polished slice-of-life anime background illustration with realistic rail details, clean linework, soft painterly shading, and a slightly nostalgic, cinematic mood.

content: Create a glossy Japanese pro-wrestling magazine cover illustration in a dramatic seinen-anime style. Vertical full-cover composition, packed and high-energy, showing exactly 8 handsome male wrestlers inside a wrestling ring arena under blue-white stadium lights, with blurred audience bokeh in the background and visible red ring ropes crossing behind them. All 8 men are adults with extremely muscular, bodybuilder-level physiques, oiled shiny skin, defined abs, pecs, arms, and shoulders, posed like a special feature lineup for a sports magazine. Arrange them in layered groups: 4 wrestlers across the upper half and 4 across the lower half, with 2 central foreground champions dominating the middle. The central left foreground wrestler has short black hair, a confident serious expression, a clenched right fist, and metallic black-and-gold trunks. The central right foreground wrestler has short spiky blond hair, a stoic expression, one hand on his hip, and metallic bright blue trunks. Around them, place 6 additional wrestlers with varied hair colors and styles including bleached blond, black with long bangs, orange spiky hair, and dark brown spiky hair; all wear colorful pro-wrestling trunks in red, blue, gold, or multicolor patterns, with some wrist tape or wristbands, and all are shirtless. Emphasize glossy highlights, magazine-retouched skin, heroic anatomy, and slightly exaggerated masculine beauty. Use a bold commercial cover design with oversized Japanese masthead text at the top reading {argument name="magazine title" default="熱闘プロレス"} in huge red letters with gold edging and white highlights, plus a smaller English subtitle beneath it reading "NETTOU PRO-WRESTLING". Add a top catchphrase in Japanese above the title: "プロレスが一番熱い！". In the upper right corner, include a blue issue box with white text showing {argument name="issue date" default="2026年5月号"}, a large numeral {argument name="issue number" default="5"}, the English month-year "MAY 2026", and small pricing text "定価1,200円". Place bold feature cover lines around the wrestlers in authentic Japanese magazine typography: on the left, large yellow-white text "最強世代 8人集結" with smaller lines "新たな歴史が いま、始まる！"; on the right, large white text "美しき筋肉と闘志" with smaller yellow and white subhead lines; another red label with white text reading "若きエースたちの現在地" and smaller white text beneath it; a lower-left black box headed "SPECIAL INTERVIEW" in English with multiple stacked Japanese interviewee names; a cream circular burst on the lower right reading "両面BIG ピンナップ付き！". Across the lower center, add the main feature title in explosive oversized Japanese lettering: a red ribbon label "保存版" above giant gold and red text {argument name="main headline" default="イケメンレスラー大特集"}, with a smaller white tagline below: "その強さ、その美しさ、そのすべてに恋をする！". Add a barcode in the bottom right corner with small numeric text beneath it. Overall look: premium Japanese sports-entertainment magazine cover, polished, flashy, energetic, intense, glamorous, crowded but readable, with accurate Japanese text rendering and authentic editorial hierarchy.

content: A hyper-realistic futuristic racing game splash screen set in a neon-soaked cyberpunk city at night, showing a Formula-style electric race on a rain-slick street circuit from a low third-person chase camera behind the player's car. The main car is a sleek black open-wheel racer with glowing cyan accent lines, cyan-lit wheel rims, and bright red rear light text reading NEO.JP, drifting slightly on wet asphalt and throwing sparks from the underbody. Ahead are 3 opponent cars total, including a red open-wheel car on the right, a darker car in the center distance, and another car farther ahead near the curve. The road curves left through a canyon of tall buildings covered in giant LED billboards and vertical neon signs, with strong reflections in the wet pavement. At the center background, a massive illuminated billboard reads FORMULA NEO with NEO in huge cyan letters. Add yellow illuminated chevron barriers along both sides of the turn and intense motion blur emphasizing speed. Overlay a complete esports racing HUD: top left position indicator showing 2/8 with a small POS label; a left leaderboard with 8 ranked drivers total, listing 1 KAZUKI, 2 NEO DRIVER, 3 REIJI, 4 YUINA, 5 SHO, 6 ALICE, 7 LUCAS, 8 TAIGA, with time gaps next to most names; top right lap info showing LAP 2/3, BEST 00:58.123, LAP 00:21.456, sector times S1 00:21.456, S2 00:36.890, S3 --:--:---; an objective box reading OBJECTIVE and 1位でフィニッシュする; bottom left a track minimap and a DRS meter at 98%; bottom right a circular futuristic speedometer showing 278 KM/H and gear 6. Along the bottom foreground, place a lineup of 8 anime-style team member portraits from the chest up, evenly spanning the width like a character roster overlay: 1 a silver-haired person in a white racing jacket, 2 a red-haired person in a red jacket over a black shirt with a flame emblem, 3 a long purple-haired person in a purple outfit, 4 a black-haired person in a dark Team Neo racing suit, 5 a short blue-black-haired person in a dark suit, 6 a light-brown-haired person in a gray suit, 7 a green-haired person in a white and green outfit with a hand on the chest, 8 a blond person in a yellow jacket, plus at the far right an additional pink-haired hoodie portrait integrated into the bottom lineup for a dense team-banner look; center the text TEAM NEO above the bottom portraits in glowing cyan UI styling. Use a polished AAA game key art aesthetic, ultra-detailed reflections, cinematic contrast, electric blue and magenta lighting, sharp UI graphics, dramatic perspective, and a highly realistic yet stylized promotional poster finish.

content: A cinematic anime-style action illustration of a {argument name="character age/style" default="high-school girl"} in a dark navy school uniform kneeling on a sunlit industrial catwalk and aiming a compact black handgun straight toward the viewer with a two-handed grip. She has a short messy bob with {argument name="hair color" default="black"}, loose strands blown sideways, and a tense forward-leaning posture as if taking cover while returning fire. Her outfit consists of 5 clearly visible clothing pieces: a black school blazer with brass buttons, a white dress shirt, a blue plaid necktie, a matching blue plaid pleated skirt, and black knee-high socks with glossy black loafers. She also carries 2 tactical accessories: a black thigh holster strapped to her right leg with a pistol inserted, and a dark side pouch on her hip. Place her low in the frame in a dramatic foreshortened perspective, with her bent knees dominating the foreground and the gun centered. The setting is a narrow elevated walkway inside an industrial steel structure with beams, railings, weathered wooden floorboards, crates, and 1 black metal barrel on the left. Use strong diagonal shadows and bright afternoon sunlight streaming through the metal framework, creating alternating bands of light and shade across the floor and figures. content: Using the provided reference image of the packaged washed mozuku seaweed, transform it into a cute Japanese recipe infographic poster that teaches how to eat it properly. Keep the actual product recognizable by showing the package photo near the top and reuse the mozuku itself in small food/process photos, but redesign everything else as a bright, clean, blue-and-pink editorial layout. Add a cheerful anime catmaid guide character with pink hair and cat ears appearing multiple times as the instructor. Create a bold Japanese headline at the top: 「洗いもずくを 美味しく食べる手順書」 and a worker/name tag reading 「作業者：きらりあ・ネオン」. Build a 6-step vertical instruction flow on the left/middle with numbered circles 1 through 6 and arrows between them. The 6 step titles should be: 1「状態確認」 2「軽く水洗い」 3「水気を切る」 4「食べやすくカット」 5「味付け」 6「盛り付けて完成」. For each step, include a short Japanese explanation and a supporting image/illustration showing the mozuku at that stage; specifically include 1 package/close-up state check image, 1 rinsing-in-colander image, 1 draining colander image, 1 cutting-with-kitchen-scissors image, 3 seasoning option mini-boxes under step 5, and 1 finished bowl image under step 6. Add a right-side panel titled 「おすすめ具材」 with exactly 7 ingredients shown as small labeled illustrations: きゅうり, 長芋, オクラ, みょうが, 大葉, しらす, 豆腐. Add another right-side recommendation panel titled 「ネオンちゃんおすすめ」 containing exactly 2 dish cards labeled A and B: A「もずく酢きゅうり」 and B「もずくスープ」, each with a bowl image and ingredient list in Japanese. Add a bottom-right caution box titled 「注意」 with exactly 3 bullet points: 「洗いすぎない」「水気をしっかり切る」「開封後は早めに食べる」. Add a friendly footer banner in Japanese encouraging enjoyment of mozuku. Style it like a highly readable supermarket handout / cooking guide infographic with rounded boxes, glossy accents, clear hierarchy, and vibrant kawaii appeal.

content: Using the provided reference image, keep the cafe photo composition, lighting, food, cup, plate, table, and background unchanged, and turn it into an emotive social-media style annotated photo by overlaying handwritten white Japanese copy directly on the image. Add 1 main headline in the upper left with an underline and small accent marks: 「朝のごほうび」. Beneath it, add 1 short subcopy block in 2 lines: 「焼きたての香りで / 今日がはじまる。」. Then add 6 handwritten callout notes with sketchy arrows pointing to details in the scene: 1) 「バターの香り、ふわり…」 pointing to the croissant, 2) 「先端まできれい」 pointing to the left tip of the croissant, 3) 「表面の照りがたまらない〜」 pointing to the glossy top surface, 4) 「さくっと軽い層」 pointing to the upper right area of the croissant, 5) 「この立体感が好き」 near the plate edge, 6) 「やさしい一口」 pointing to the cup. Add 1 closing handwritten sentence near the lower right: 「なんでもない朝が、少し好きになる。♡」. Make all typography look like casual marker or chalk-pen handwriting with thin uneven strokes, soft organic spacing, doodled underlines, arrows, and small decorative marks. Keep the text integrated naturally into the empty wall and tabletop spaces, with a warm minimal Japanese lifestyle ad / UGC feel.

content: A dark fantasy trading-card illustration of a noble anime knight woman in a ruined gothic cathedral, shown from the waist up in a dramatic three-quarter view. She wears a royal blue dress with gold trim, a silver breastplate with blue heraldic markings, armored gauntlets, and a dark corseted waist, with a deep violet underskirt visible in torn layers. Her blonde hair is tied into a braided bun with loose bangs and a large dark blue ribbon at the back. Her body is undergoing {argument name="status effect" default="partial petrification"}: both hands, arms, and large sections of her dress and armor are cracked stone, with marble-like fissures spreading across her body. Her pose is tense and elegant, one petrified hand raised near her face and the other curled in front of her torso, as if reacting in fear or shock. Her expression should suggest dread and helplessness. Around her float 5 broken stone tablets or card-like slabs engraved with faint figures and symbols, suspended in the air at different depths. Beside her hovers a gigantic monstrous eyeball, about the size of her head and shoulders, with a cracked stone sclera, a staring iris, jagged crown-like spikes, and ornate organic ridges around it; it drips thick pale wax-like fluid mixed with dark blood in long heavy strands and droplets. The environment is a cavernous, shadowy cathedral interior with towering arches fading into darkness. Place multiple melted candles in the scene, including visible candle clusters at the left edge, lower center background, and right foreground on stone stands; their flames are small and warm, casting amber highlights. Add many glowing droplets or motes falling through the air, echoing the dripping fluid from the eye. The mood is cursed, tragic, and oppressive, like a high-rarity status ailment card for a fantasy game. Render in highly detailed painterly anime style with realistic textures, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, cracked stone surfaces, weathered fabric, polished but damaged armor, and a vertical card-art composition.

content: A dramatic dark fantasy anime illustration of {argument name="character name" default="a blonde female knight king"} kneeling in the center of a ruined stone chamber while undergoing partial petrification. She wears ornate blue and silver royal armor with a deep cobalt blue dress, white layered underskirt, silver breastplate, and gold trim, styled like a legendary holy knight. Her blonde hair is tied back with a large dark blue ribbon, with braided sections and loose bangs. The composition is a slightly top-down full-body view, centered and symmetrical, with the character kneeling on a circular cracked stone sigil floor. Both arms, both legs, and surrounding serpentine restraints are transforming into fractured gray stone, with visible cracks, broken chunks, dust, and debris flying outward. Large broken shackles and heavy chains bind her wrists and ankles; 4 chain clusters are visible, 2 attached to the arms and 2 attached to the legs. Around her, 4 snake-like stone forms curl up from the ruined floor and pillars, framing the scene like cursed restraints. The petrification is incomplete: her torso armor, dress, and hair remain human and intact, while the limbs are heavily turned to cracked marble-like stone with rough texture and glowing fracture lines. The environment is a dark ruined sanctuary with shattered pillars, scattered rubble, and cold dim lighting, accented by subtle golden highlights in the floor pattern. Mood is tragic, powerful, and mythic, with cinematic high-detail rendering, sharp textures, dynamic debris, dramatic shadows, and polished anime game card illustration quality.

content: A dramatic vertical Japanese movie poster in a hyper-detailed cinematic fantasy style, glowing with fiery orange, red, gold, and neon magenta light over a nighttime city skyline. In the center, a single chibi-like fairy woman is the star, floating toward the viewer in a dynamic forward-reaching pose with one oversized hand extended in forced perspective. She has short wavy auburn-brown hair, pointed elf ears, large iridescent translucent butterfly wings, a sparkling silver beret, a fitted white shimmering top, a short holographic metallic skirt, and glowing white shoes. Her face area is deliberately obscured by a centered square censor block in warm brown. Behind her, explosions of particles, sparks, comet streaks, and radiant lens-flare energy create a sense of destiny and impact. The composition is packed like a blockbuster teaser poster, with glowing Japanese typography and social-media-style callout panels arranged around the character. At the very top, large luminous Japanese text reads: 「そのひと言が、誰かの明日を燃やす。」. Across the upper left is 1 profile card panel showing a circular avatar, a Japanese display name with blue verification badge, handle, bio text, link, and follower count, styled like an X profile screenshot. On the left side there are 3 additional stacked callout panels: panel 1 says 「フォロワー 11,000+人 いつもありがとう！」 with a follower icon; panel 2 says 「今日のAI解説 生成AIってなに？ 初心者向けやさしく解説」 and includes a thumbnail card with small engagement counts; panel 3 says 「アイデア → 作品へ AI × 創造力で あなただけの物語を。」 with small creative tool icons. On the right side there are 5 glowing speech-bubble panels with icons, each angled slightly and rim-lit in orange: 1 「わかりやすい AI解説！ 神です…！」 with a heart icon, 2 「元気をもらえる！ いつも励み！」 with a smiley icon, 3 「作品づくりの勇気が出る！ 背中を押された！」 with a star icon, 4 「AIで好きが形になる！ アイデアが広がる！」 with a camera icon, 5 「制作の真価 プロの現場から学ぶ AI活用テクニック」 with a clapperboard icon. Across the lower middle, add a handwritten glowing phrase in blue-white: 「想いを カタチに。」. Below it, the giant main title in blazing molten brush-style Japanese lettering reads: 「未来は、つくれる。 タイムラインの 妖精アーヤ」, with an English subtitle underneath in small serif capitals: “FAIRY AYA OF THE TIMELINE”. Beneath the title, add dense film-credit style lines in Japanese, including creator/AI/video references, then a centered starring line: 「主演：妖精アーヤ」 with small wings. At the very bottom, place a huge release notice in bold glowing Japanese text: 「近日公開」, and to its right a rounded dark plaque with gold border that says: 「未来は、つくれる。」. Add a small butterfly emblem near the lower right. The whole image should feel like a magical viral social-media celebrity transformed into the lead of an epic fantasy film, with explosive contrast, richly textured particles, neon embers, glossy poster finish, and premium theatrical key art for {argument name="character name" default="妖精アーヤ"}.

content: A luminous fantasy-anime movie poster in a vertical theatrical one-sheet composition, centered on a cute chibi-style fairy girl standing on a glowing circular platform in a futuristic neon city at night. She has short wavy auburn hair, pointed elf ears, large sparkling brown eyes, translucent iridescent butterfly wings, and a clear glittering beret-like halo cap. Her face is intentionally obscured by a centered square mosaic censor block. She poses like a performer or creator on stage, one arm raised holding a glowing pen-like wand, the other arm extended outward. She wears a glossy white cropped long-sleeve top, holographic iridescent shorts, and chunky white sneakers. The whole image is drenched in pastel violet, pink, blue, and pearlescent highlights, with floating particles, lens flares, sparkles, bokeh, butterflies, and magical light trails. Around her float 10 translucent holographic social-media-style panels and interface cards: 1 large post card at upper left showing her portrait with the Japanese text "今日の想いを、シェアします。" and reaction counts "12.6K", "532", and "1.2K"; 1 small quote card near top center-left reading "今日の気づき 小さな一歩が未来を変える。"; 1 small memo card at top center-right reading "アイデアメモ いつか、声になる物語。"; 1 large video post card at upper right showing her portrait with a play button and the text "夢は、声に出すと動き出す。"; 1 square heart-like icon panel at mid-left; 1 quote card at left center reading "あなたの言葉に救われました。"; 1 story panel at lower left reading "みんなのストーリー あなたの体験が、誰かの勇気に。" with 3 small thumbnail images; 1 reply/comment card at mid-right reading "共感しました！ ずっと応援しています！" with a tiny profile icon; 1 prompt panel at right center reading "プロンプト 光、希望、つながり、未来、魔法、優しさ" with a button labeled "生成"; and 1 hashtag card at lower right reading "#想いがつながる #今日もありがとう #未来をつくるのは私たち". Add 2 floating engagement counters near the lower right of the character: a heart counter "25.8K" and a repost/share counter "3.7K". Include a diagonal film strip in the lower left foreground with 4 visible frames featuring the fairy girl, plus a partially visible video editing timeline interface beneath it. The background should feel like a magical digital metropolis with skyscrapers, screens, and a crowd silhouette at the bottom, blending social media, filmmaking, and fairy-tale aesthetics. At the very top, place the Japanese tagline "ひとつの投稿が、誰かの明日を光らせる。" in elegant white text. At the bottom center, create a huge glowing Japanese title in ornate serif calligraphy: "タイムラインの妖精", with a small butterfly ornament, and below it the English subtitle "FAIRY AYA". Add realistic movie-poster credit lines in Japanese beneath the title, including names such as "監督：ヒカリ ユウ", "脚本：ナナセ マイ", "出演：フェアリー アヤ", and a row of production credits ending with "2025 FAIRY AYA Film Partners". Along the very bottom, add the Japanese line "あなたの投稿が、映画になる。" and a large release line "2025.7.25(金) ROADSHOW". Style: ultra-detailed, glossy, cinematic, whimsical, inspirational, high-saturation fantasy social-media poster, polished 3D anime illustration, dramatic poster lighting, volumetric glow, magical realism, premium film advertising design.

content: Create a celebratory Japanese social-media milestone poster in a square format, mixing a realistic smartphone profile screenshot on the left with bold hand-drawn manga-style lettering and colorful festive doodles on the right. The main headline should dominate the upper-right area in huge red brush lettering with a white outline and yellow burst accents, reading {argument name="headline text" default="36,000人突破！"}. Beneath it, add large black handwritten calligraphy reading {argument name="subheadline text" default="感謝です！"}, underlined with a thick hot-pink marker stroke. The left side shows a tilted smartphone-style screenshot of an X/Twitter profile page in Japanese, with a dark banner header, profile avatar, verified badge, username line, bio text, tabs, and a visible follower count circled in red. The follower count should read approximately 36,004 followers, with the circled number placed near the lower-middle of the phone screenshot. Include a visible post preview with a 2x2 image grid of sparkling gold and colorful light textures. Around the whole composition, fill the white background with energetic confetti, streamers, stars, crown doodles, party poppers, hearts, squiggles, and colorful radial bursts in pink, blue, yellow, orange, and teal, creating a loud celebratory announcement design. In the lower-right corner, place a cheerful anime-style chibi male character with {argument name="hair style" default="dark brown curly hair"}, wearing a black hoodie, raising one fist in a victory pose. The chibi face should be simple and cute, with flushed cheeks and an excited expression. Add a white speech bubble outlined in black near the character containing 2 lines of Japanese handwritten text: the first line says {argument name="speech text" default="いつも応援してくれる皆さんのおかげです！"} and the second line in pink says {argument name="thank you text" default="本当にありがとう！"}. Count and render exactly 11 major decorative motif types across the page: confetti pieces, streamers, stars, crown doodles, party poppers, hearts, radial burst lines, spark marks, squiggle ribbons, colored paint-like swashes, and exclamation accents. The overall style should feel like a handmade celebration flyer meets social-media achievement graphic, with thick brush lettering, marker textures, bright saturated colors, playful asymmetry, and a high-energy Japanese pop aesthetic.

content: A bold Japanese social-media milestone celebration graphic in a square 1:1 layout, combining a smartphone screenshot and hand-painted calligraphy-style typography. On the left half, show a realistic screenshot of an X profile page in dark mode and white content area, slightly tilted, with the profile name "タツキ｜サムネ顧問" and handle "@gibkun1" visible, a blue verification badge, and the follower count circled in thick red marker. The circled count should read {argument name="follower count" default="36,004"} with a large red arrow pointing toward it. The screenshot should include a profile icon at upper left, Japanese bio text lines, top navigation tabs, and a tweet preview with 4 small glowing thumbnail images near the bottom, evoking an authentic mobile app capture. Across the right half and partially overlapping the screenshot, place huge brush lettering in Japanese that reads "36,000人達成!!" in vivid red and black ink with dramatic white outline and drop shadow, then below it larger expressive black brush lettering reading "本当にありがとう!!" with thick red underline strokes. Add energetic manga-style emphasis lines, starbursts, black speed lines, yellow spark accents, and rough paint textures around the text. Near the bottom right, include a small chibi-style celebratory character with {argument name="character hair" default="dark curly brown"} hair, wearing a {argument name="character outfit" default="black hoodie"}, both fists raised in excitement. The face is intentionally blurred or obscured.
