content: A clean celebratory social-media milestone graphic on a soft white background, styled like a screenshot of an X profile page placed on the left and handwritten thank-you lettering on the right. The left side shows a realistic mobile-style profile card for a Japanese creator account with a dark banner image at the top featuring dramatic white brush-calligraphy Japanese text, a circular profile icon overlapping the banner, the display name “タッキ | サムネ顧問” with a blue verification badge, the handle @gibkun1, and several lines of Japanese bio text in a standard app UI font. Include small profile metadata lines such as birth date and join date, then a stats row where the follower count is the focal point: “36,004 フォロワー” circled in red. Below that, show the profile navigation tabs with exactly 7 labels: ポスト, 返信, ハイライト, 動画, 画像, 記事, いいね. Under the tabs, include one visible post preview with a small avatar, Japanese post text, and a 2 by 2 image grid containing 4 warm glowing abstract thumbnail images in black, gold, and orange tones. On the right side, create large casual handwritten Japanese text in black reading “36,000人 達成しました” with a pale yellow highlight under the number and a red underline beneath the second line, plus 3 small red celebratory accent marks above the number. Add a thick hand-drawn red arrow pointing from the right-side message toward the circled follower count on the profile screenshot. Beneath that, place another handwritten message reading “ありがとう ございます！” with a soft pink underline, and in the lower right add smaller handwritten text reading “これからも 有益な情報を お届けしていきます！” followed by a simple smiling face doodle and 2 small pink sparkle doodles. The overall composition should feel like a polished appreciation post made from a screenshot and marker annotations, with subtle drop shadow around the screenshot card, balanced spacing, crisp Japanese typography in the UI, and expressive brush-pen handwriting for the celebratory notes.

content:
The Western Paradise (also known as the Western Pure Land, Sukhavati) is the Buddha-land of Amitabha (Infinite Life Buddha). Its core characteristic is the absence of all suffering and the experience of only joy, in stark contrast to our 'enduring' (Saha) world. Located in the west of our world, ten trillion Buddha-lands away (Amitabha Sutra).

Main Buddha: Amitabha Buddha (Infinite Light, Infinite Life), who constantly preaches the Dharma; flanked by Avalokiteshvara Bodhisattva and Mahasthamaprapta Bodhisattva, collectively known as the 'Three Sages of the West'.

Land Environment: Adorned with Seven Treasures, flawless.
Ground: Gold as the ground, flat, soft, bright, and clean, without mountains, rivers, ravines, thorns, or stones.
Seven Treasure Ponds and Eight Merit Waters: Seven treasure ponds everywhere (gold, silver, lapis lazuli, crystal, tridacna, red pearl, agate). The water possesses eight merits: sweet, cold, soft, light, clear, fragrant, thirst-quenching, and heart-nourishing. Golden sand at the bottom, seven-treasure pathways, and lotuses in the pond as large as wheels, emitting blue, yellow, red, and white light.
Architecture: Seven-treasure pavilions, palaces, and lecture halls, floating in the air, changing size at will, transparent and bright, countless times better than the heavenly realms.
Precious Trees and Heavenly Music: Seven rows of trees, seven rows of railings, seven rows of nets, all made of four treasures. The wind blows through the trees and nets, producing subtle Dharma sounds like hundreds of thousands of instruments playing together, naturally leading listeners to mindfulness of Buddha, Dharma, and Sangha.
Climate and Heavenly Rain: No heat or cold, no wind or rain, always mild and comfortable; Mandarava flowers rain down from the sky six times a day and night, fragrant and colorful.
Marvelous Birds: White cranes, peacocks, parrots, Kalavinkas, etc., all manifested by the Buddha to produce harmonious sounds proclaiming the Dharma.

Sentient Beings: No suffering, only joy, infinite lifespan.
Rebirth: Beings are born from lotus flowers in the seven treasure ponds, not from parents, free from the suffering of birth, aging, sickness, and death.
Appearance: Purple-gold bodies, majestic and solemn, similar to Amitabha Buddha; possessing five supernatural powers: heavenly eye, heavenly ear, telepathy, past-life recall, and spiritual travel, free and unobstructed.
Lifespan: Immeasurable kalpas, nearly eternal, without early death or aging.
Nature: All are superior good people, free from greed, anger, ignorance, jealousy, or conflict; compassionate, equal, wise, and pure, constantly hearing the Dharma.
Life: Clothing and food manifest naturally without labor; in the morning, one can visit ten trillion Buddha-lands to offer to Buddhas and return by mealtime.

Time and Space: Infinite and Eternal.
Time: No day or night, no months or years, eternal happiness; the world does not undergo the changes of formation, existence, decay, and void.
Space: Vast and boundless, never crowded even with beings from all ten directions; a single grain of dust can contain three thousand great worlds.

content: A surreal still-life in a dark black void, staged like a moody luxury sculpture display under a single soft spotlight. At the center, a large floating sphere dominates the composition, about one-third of the frame height, with a glossy translucent surface textured like swirling clouds and planetary gas bands in muted teal, cream, gray, and pale gold. Beneath and around the sphere sits an organic mound of dense mossy foliage and coral-like plant forms in olive green and bronze, mixed with a cluster of tiny luminous white-violet flowers on the left and a brighter white floral cluster on the right. Behind the sphere are 2 horizontal rectangular slabs suspended in space: 1 dark smoky slab on the left, partially hidden, and 1 larger warm brown-and-gold marbled slab on the right with vein-like lightning patterns. In the lower right foreground is 1 polished rectangular stone block resting on the ground, colored black, gray, and white with dramatic marble veining. The ground is a smooth matte surface with a pale green elliptical pool of light fading into darkness. Cinematic fine-art product photography style, surreal contemporary installation, minimal composition, strong negative space, soft bloom, subtle film grain, low-key lighting, glossy and mineral textures, slightly vintage color grading, high contrast but gentle focus, elegant and mysterious atmosphere.

content: A vast cinematic sci-fi megacity at sunset, viewed from a high observation platform between dark futuristic superstructures, with an immense glowing orange-and-gold sky filled with dramatic clouds and haze. The scene shows a sprawling vertical city extending far into the distance, packed with countless ultra-tall needle-like skyscrapers and luminous architectural spires rising through layers of clouds. A colossal hovering platform-city dominates the upper right-middle area, dark metallic and heavily detailed, suspended above the skyline with smaller towers and structures attached beneath it. In the lower left foreground, a sleek futuristic spacecraft is launching away from a terrace, angled diagonally outward toward the center, with bright blue engine exhaust trails and reflective metallic panels. Tiny human silhouettes stand along the terrace edge for scale. Multiple small flying vehicles and hovercraft are scattered across the sky at different distances, creating dense air traffic. Far below, the city grid glitters with warm lights through atmospheric mist. Use a grand panoramic composition, high contrast between dark architectural framing and radiant sunset light, intricate techno-industrial detail, atmospheric perspective, volumetric clouds, reflective surfaces, and a richly colored palette of amber, peach, violet, deep navy, and electric blue accents. Ultra-detailed, epic futuristic concept art, photoreal matte-painting feel, sharp focus, dramatic scale, vertical 4:3 composition, no text or logos.

content: A tightly zoomed-in comparison image demonstrating fake pixel-art rendering, showing a low-resolution-looking scene enlarged on screen with a thin bright blue square grid overlay across the entire frame. The composition is an abstract close crop of a pixel-art-style environment: sandy tan and ochre blocky forms on the left and center, a dark navy and black stepped diagonal mass on the right, muted olive-green and slate-blue shapes along the upper background, and a few lighter golden highlights. Every edge looks staircase-like and blocky at first glance, but the colors softly blur and blend within the apparent squares instead of aligning perfectly to the grid, creating the impression of pixel art that breaks down under inspection. Include a small white crosshair cursor near the upper left quadrant to suggest image analysis in an editor. The image should look like retro pixel art at first glance when viewed zoomed out, but not be perfectly grid-aligned or true sprite-based pixel art; instead it should feel like painterly image-generation imitating pixel art, with soft inconsistencies in the block shapes and edges. Place the bird large in the foreground, slightly left of center, with glossy near-black feathers shaded in deep navy and indigo, a dark beak, and one small amber-brown eye visible. Surround it with tall yellow-gold grasses and exactly 9 visible small purple wildflower blossoms scattered in the foreground. In the midground, show a broad rural plain with patchy fields and a dark green tree line including a few tall narrow conifers on the right. In the distance, add a low mountain range in muted blue-violet tones. Above, create a bright {argument name="sky color" default="soft blue"} sky filled with large chunky cumulus clouds and a few smaller cloud bands, all rendered in limited-color dithered blocks. Use a warm late-afternoon palette with gold, blue, lavender, and dark charcoal, strong atmospheric depth, and a calm pastoral mood. content: A highly detailed historical maritime scene at water level, showing two large wooden sailing ships anchored close together on calm reflective water under a bright blue sky with soft scattered clouds. On the left, a massive ornate European galleon dominates the composition, viewed from the rear-left stern quarter, with richly carved baroque stern decorations in gold, red, blue, and cream, heraldic emblems, multiple stern windows, and a dark hull with warm reddish-brown planking. It has 4 visible masts including a bowsprit, dense black rigging, crow's nests, and many cream-white square sails partially unfurled and hanging loosely. On the right, a traditional Chinese junk faces slightly left, with 1 very large rust-brown battened sail raised, a curved wooden hull in brown, black, and white, carved stern details, and smaller masts and rigging. In the foreground center, include 1 small wooden rowboat with 1 standing boatman wearing light clothing and a brimmed hat, adding scale between the two ships. In the distant background, show faint silhouettes of additional sailing vessels near the horizon on the far left. Lighting is crisp daylight with warm highlights on the wood, subtle reflections in the rippling water, and a painterly yet photorealistic finish, ultra-detailed textures, cinematic composition, wide aspect ratio, no modern elements.

content: A cinematic historical war scene from Romance of the Three Kingdoms depicting the straw boat borrowing arrows on a wide gray river during a violent rainstorm, viewed from a slightly elevated front angle. In the foreground, a convoy of 6 narrow wooden boats is lashed together in a line, each boat wrapped thickly with dense bundles of straw along the sides and bow, creating rough protective walls. Hundreds of black-feathered arrows are embedded all over the straw armor, sticking out in every direction, with more arrows flying diagonally through the air in heavy wind and rain. The lead boat dominates the frame; its cabin is covered with dark blue fabric curtains and blue roof panels. Standing calmly inside the front cabin are 2 robed ancient Chinese strategists, one in a pale white robe holding a feather fan and one darker-robed companion beside him, both composed and unhurried amid the chaos. Along the left side of the boats are clustered oarsmen and soldiers in dark period clothing, with several large war drums visible on the decks. In the background across the river, a massive enemy river fleet fills the misty distance: dozens of tall wooden warships, watchtowers, and platforms crowded with troops and archers. Multiple military banners bearing the single large Chinese character "曹" rise above the fleet, indicating Cao Cao's forces. The atmosphere is cold, desaturated, and epic, with fog, smoke, rain streaks, rough water, low contrast blue-gray lighting, and highly detailed realistic textures in wet wood, straw, fabric, and river spray. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic ancient Chinese battlefield tableau, dramatic scale, moody historical realism, vertical composition.

content: A monumental cinematic historical painting of the Battle of Red Cliffs at night, showing an entire ancient Chinese river fleet consumed by fire. The composition is a tall vertical frame viewed from a slightly elevated dockside angle, with the river running deep into the center distance and packed with burning warships. Count exactly 3 dominant foreground raft-like platforms or deck structures on the lower left and center foreground, each made of rough timber and engulfed in flames, with soldiers standing shoulder to shoulder among drums, poles, and red battle flags. Count exactly 2 mounted commanders in the lower right foreground galloping toward the viewer along a wooden pier or bridge: the front rider is sharply visible, wearing dark lamellar armor and a wind-whipped deep red cloak, shouting with urgency; the second rider beside him is darker and partially obscured. Across the middle ground, count dozens of ancient Chinese sail warships and smaller boats, many already burning, with traditional battened sails, wooden hulls, siege-like superstructures, and collapsing masts. The far shoreline and fleet form a continuous inferno, with towering sheets of orange flame, black-red smoke clouds filling the sky, and countless sparks and embers blowing through the air. The water reflects molten orange firelight with streaks of black shadow between ships. Fill the image with dense soldiers, rigging, banners, drums, weapons, and chaotic battlefield detail, but keep the overall readability centered on the river of fire. Use a dark, dramatic palette of black, ember red, burnt orange, and bronze, with intense high-contrast firelight, volumetric smoke, epic scale, ultra-detailed textures, dynamic motion, and the grandeur of a legendary Three Kingdoms scene. Historical Chinese warfare aesthetic, grim, heroic, catastrophic, painterly realism, no modern elements, no text.

content: A cinematic historical scene from Romance of the Three Kingdoms showing the {argument name="scene name" default="Peach Garden Oath"}. Three ancient Chinese men stand side by side behind a ceremonial altar table in a blooming orchard of pink peach blossoms, each holding a respectful fist-and-palm salute at chest height. The man on the left is broad and heavily built, wearing dark lamellar armor with a deep red robe panel and rugged warrior styling; the man in the center is shorter and slimmer, wearing layered brown scholar-official robes and a simple topknot; the man on the right is tall and imposing, wearing flowing dark green robes with armor details, a long black beard, and a noble commanding presence. In front of them is one large carved wooden altar table arranged with exactly 10 ritual elements: 1 bronze incense burner in the center with three lit incense sticks and visible curling smoke, 4 bronze candlesticks with small flames placed near the corners, 1 fruit plate with peaches, 1 ewer or wine vessel on the left, 2 bronze pouring vessels on the right, and 1 open scroll laid across the tabletop. Pink petals drift through the air and scatter on the ground. The orchard forms a tunnel of flowering branches overhead, with rustic wooden fencing and traditional buildings softly visible in the background through light spring haze. Include exactly 2 horses flanking the group: a dark horse on the far left and a white horse on the far right, both saddled and calm. Composition is symmetrical, eye-level, centered on the oath ritual, with rich period textures, realistic faces and fabrics, soft natural morning light, shallow atmospheric depth, and an epic, reverent, painterly-cinematic realism in the style of a prestige historical drama.

content:
Please create a high-end Dunhuang mural-style artwork centered on {argument name="subject" default="Flying Goddess"}. The image should use {argument name="composition" default="the main character as the sole visual focal point"}, capturing the sacred moment of its core action/context. The overall atmosphere should be {argument name="atmosphere" default="sacred, solemn, and magnificent"}, reflecting a museum-grade aesthetic, cultural depth, and collectible artistic quality.

Subject Requirements:
The main character must exude an elegant, tall, and divine temperament with a stretched posture characteristic of Dunhuang murals. The facial expression should be serene, holy, and inviolable, mirroring the dignity of goddesses or bodhisattvas. The hair should be high-bunned with intricate gold ornaments, necklaces, and jewelry. The clothing should be luxurious with flowing lines and ribbons that create a rhythmic sense of ascension.

Gold Texture Requirements:
Emphasize structural use of gold rather than scattered accents. Use gold leaf, gilding, and gold thread embroidery on the character's crown, jewelry, and clothing edges. Sacred elements like halos, lotus pedestals, and ceiling patterns should also feature visible but restrained gold decoration, presenting a sense of weathered luxury that has survived for millennia.

Color Requirements:
Primary colors should include ochre red, cinnabar, blue-green, mineral green, and ivory white, complemented by refined gold. The tone should be rich and ancient, avoiding modern saturated colors. The background should enhance the subject's divinity using deep mineral textures or ancient wall gradients.

Decorative and Spatial Requirements:
Incorporate typical Dunhuang visual language such as flying apsaras, lotus flowers, and auspicious clouds, but keep them concentrated around the main subject. Maintain breathing room with cloud-filled voids and holy light. Far-off elements like celestial palaces can be added to enhance spatial depth.

Material Quality:
Highlight the texture of ancient grotto murals and mineral pigments, showing signs of weathering, cracks, and historic patina, while retaining the luster of eroded gold leaf to create a 'refined yet ancient' high-art texture.

content: A traditional Chinese ink calligraphy artwork on aged beige xuan paper, presented as a clean flat scan or photograph of a single hanging scroll page with no frame. The composition is entirely vertical Chinese cursive script, bold expressive grass-script brushwork in deep black ink with dynamic stroke variation, flying-white texture, dry-brush breaks, and elegant rhythm. Write the full poem {argument name="poem text" default="怒发冲冠，凭栏处、潇潇雨歇。抬望眼，仰天长啸，壮怀激烈。三十功名尘与土，八千里路云和月。莫等闲，白了少年头，空悲切。\n靖康耻，犹未雪；臣子恨，何时灭！驾长车，踏破贺兰山缺。壮志饥餐胡虏肉，笑谈渴饮匈奴血。待从头，收拾旧山河，朝天阙。"} in large vertical columns arranged right to left, about 8 main poem columns across the page, each column flowing freely with slight variations in spacing and tilt. Leave a wide left margin containing a smaller vertical inscription with 3 narrow columns: the title and attribution reading {argument name="inscription text" default="岳飞 满江红 甲辰書月 某元"}, written in a more restrained but still cursive hand. Add exactly 3 small red seal stamps: 2 stacked square seals in the lower-left margin beneath the inscription, and 1 small oval seal near the upper-right edge beside the first main column. The paper should have subtle warm tan mottling, soft fibers, faint age marks, and natural uneven tone. Overall mood is heroic, scholarly, and museum-quality, with authentic Song-inspired Chinese calligraphy aesthetics, minimal background, high detail, and faithful brush texture.

content: A cinematic Renaissance art studio interior lit by soft warm window light, showing an elderly Leonardo da Vinci-like painter in left profile, seated at an easel and painting the Mona Lisa from a live model. The painter has long gray hair, a full gray beard, and wears a dark period cap and heavy dark robe. In the center foreground stands a large canvas on a wooden easel displaying the Mona Lisa composition, while on the right a live female sitter poses in the same iconic posture with folded hands, wearing a dark Renaissance dress and veil-like drapery. The mood is intimate, quiet, and painterly, with rich brown and amber tones, dramatic chiaroscuro, aged plaster walls, a leaded-glass window on the left, and a wooden table in the back holding brushes and studies. Include 2 portrait sketches pinned or propped in the background behind the model. In the lower right foreground, show a cluttered painter’s worktable with 1 paint palette, multiple small paint dabs, several brushes in a cup, and a few shallow bowls. Compose the scene as a realistic historical photograph of the moment the masterpiece is being created, medium-wide shot, slightly over-the-shoulder from behind the artist, extremely detailed textures, old master atmosphere, soft focus falloff, no modern objects.

Use a glowing amber-orange sunset sky behind her as a strong backlight, with soft rim light on her shoulders and hair, very deep shadows in the foreground, shallow depth of field, rich contrast, muted earth tones, and ultra-detailed textures of cracked plaster, aged fabric, and stone. content: Ultra-realistic interior photograph of a {argument name="aircraft model" default="Boeing 747"} cockpit viewed from slightly behind and between the two pilot seats, centered and perfectly symmetrical, showing the full main instrument panel, center pedestal, dual control yokes, and the overhead switch panel across the top edge of the frame. The cockpit is unoccupied, with 2 pilot seats visible in the foreground, each with light gray or off-white sheepskin seat covers, and 2 control yokes each holding a dark rectangular checklist or electronic note board clipped to the center. The main panel is densely packed with authentic-looking avionics, analog dials, autopilot controls, radio panels, and 6 illuminated display screens total: 2 large central navigation displays, 2 smaller blue-toned flight displays near the left and right sides, and 2 green text/data screens on the lower center pedestal. Include 4 throttle levers in the center, plus additional flap and systems levers, rotary knobs, guarded switches, and weathered brown-gray metal surfaces typical of a widebody airliner cockpit. The overhead panel should be crowded with rows of switches, toggles, and indicator lights, partially shadowed but sharply detailed. Through the front cockpit windows, show an airport gate scene in soft focus with pale concrete tarmac, painted ground markings, and a passenger jet bridge connected or positioned near the aircraft. Lighting is natural daylight from outside, subdued inside the cockpit, with realistic shadows, mild reflections on glass screens, and documentary-style photographic color grading. Emphasize extreme detail, realism, authentic aviation engineering complexity, and a near indistinguishable-from-real photo quality. Shot with a full-frame camera, eye-level perspective, wide lens around 24–28mm, deep focus across the instrument panel, high dynamic range, no people, no dramatic stylization, no illustration look.

content:
# Art that reveals a character's face from a chaotic collection of notes and symbols

---

## Style
- Mass of handwritten notes, formulas, symbols, and random lines in black ink on white paper.
- Scribbled chaos scattered across the paper.
- Sporadic emphasis using {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} (lines, fills, marker-like blobs).
- Texture of analog notebook doodles.

---

## Composition
- Random notes and symbols cover the entire area.
- The density of black ink lines and characters concentrates on the position of the "character's face."
- As a result, the silhouette and expression of the given character's face faintly emerge from the chaos.
- The face is not realistic but formed by a collection of chaotic fragments.

---

## Color Palette
- Mainly monochrome (black and white).
- {argument name="accent color" default="red ink"} placed sporadically as an accent.
- Low saturation, emphasizing the feel of analog paper and ink.

---

## Expressive Elements
- Mixed strings of semi-readable Japanese, English, and numbers.
- Mathematical symbols, arrows, dots, slashes, crosses, and ink drips.
- The outlines of the face, eyes, and hair emerge from the "negative space" and "shading" of the symbol placement.

---

## Prohibitions
- Direct, realistic portraits.
- Digitally processed, orderly geometric patterns.
- Colorful or oversaturated expressions.
- Logos, watermarks, or artificial CG aesthetics.

---

## Definition of Done (DoD)
- The whole piece works as a "chaotic collection of notes and symbols."
- The provided character's face naturally emerges from the density and arrangement of chaos.
- Colors are monochrome + {argument name="accent color" default="red accent"} only.
- Maintains the hand-drawn texture of paper and ink.

content: A photorealistic, cinematic shot set in the {argument name="location" default="White House press briefing room"}. At the podium sits {argument name="seated character" default="Sam Altman"}, wearing a dark suit and blue tie, looking visibly uncomfortable and nervous, staring blankly ahead. Standing directly behind him is {argument name="standing character" default="Homelander from The Boys"}, wearing his signature blue superhero suit with red gloves and gold eagle shoulder pads. The standing character has one red-gloved hand resting heavily and intimidatingly on the seated character's shoulder, while using his other hand to drink from a {argument name="beverage" default="glass bottle of milk"} with a confident, slightly unhinged smirk. In the background, there is a US flag on the left and a blue oval White House seal on the wall behind them. The podium has a sign reading "THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON".
